ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the transaction */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Paid for order) */,
  "source_destination" TEXT /* Source or destination of the transaction (e.g., Sri Balaji Store) */,
  "wallet_txn_id" INTEGER /* Unique wallet transaction ID */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or description of the transaction */,
  "debit" REAL /* Debit amount */,
  "credit" REAL /* Credit amount */,
  "transaction_breakup" TEXT /* Detailed transaction breakup */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., SUCCESS) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission or fees associated with the transaction */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES transaction_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_source_destination FOREIGN KEY ("source_destination") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_wallet_txn_id FOREIGN KEY ("wallet_txn_id") REFERENCES wallets ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_activity FOREIGN KEY ("activity") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wallets" (
  "wallet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wallet */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the wallet */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the wallet */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., customer, merchant) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wallet was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the wallet was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wallet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wallets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merchants" (
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merchant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the merchant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the merchant */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "business_location" TEXT /* Location of the business */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the merchant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merchant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "merchant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the merchant receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_merchant_id FOREIGN KEY ("merchant_id") REFERENCES merchants ("merchant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
